technicals_tradingview.price_structure: Post-blowoff correction: topped 495 four weeks ago with a huge weekly reversal bar (495 high -> 385.73 close on 251M shares, record volume); failed bounce to 411-414 last week; now breaking down again to 358, RIGHT AT the 200d MA (360.19) and -12.3% below the 50d (408.85). Weekly MACD bearish-crossing (hist -4.96), weekly RSI 47.5 down from 60+. Still +110% over 2 years. Today live: -2.96%, low 357.83.
